# REQ-SYS-053: Media volume shall not exceed 85 dB(A)

## ASIL Level
QM

## Description
Media volume shall not exceed 85 dB(A).

## Rationale
ISO 26262-3:2018, clause 5-5.4.2 — safety goal SG-ME-01 requires timely functional safety response.

## Verification Method
Back-to-back test comparing sensor input vs. actuator output.

## Traceability
- Up: None
- Down: None
